summary: Lead accepts M5-CLIENT-PLAYABLE-UI-001 after client_engineer REVIEW and independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. The branch implements the minimal M5 playable client flow through protocol/read-model driven React UI surfaces: M5 start, goal inspection, command preview/confirm/result status, client checkpoint save/load, AI and player reason codes, campaign risk, supply/season state, automatic battle/siege/withdrawal evidence, postwar consequences, and no-overlap Playwright coverage. The implementation stores only UI session progress and read-model slices in React/client code, does not import or mutate authoritative sim state, and does not add manual battle UI, telemetry, account/server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mod, release, commercial, desktop/Electron, sim-core, sim-ai, or save-format scope.

tests_run.result: VALID task file before lead acceptance update.
No whitespace errors before lead acceptance.

tests_run.command: pnpm --filter @monsoon/client-core test; pnpm --filter @monsoon/ui test; pnpm --filter @monsoon/map-renderer test; pnpm --filter web test
tests_run.result: Lead quick gates passed: client-core 14 tests, UI 6 tests, map-renderer 2 tests, web 4 tests.

tests_run.command: pnpm format:check; pnpm lint; affected package typechecks
tests_run.result: Lead quick gates passed before QA route. QA additionally verified architecture:check, sim:determinism, build:web, storybook:build, and test:e2e.

tests_run.command: pnpm storybook:build; pnpm test:e2e; pnpm sim:determinism; pnpm architecture:check
tests_run.result: Independent QA recorded these gates passed; stale task aliases build:storybook/e2e do not exist, while repo actual scripts storybook:build/test:e2e passed.

decisions: Accept the implementation for PR/CI/main integration. Do not mark CLOSED until PR CI passes, merge enters main, and local main is synchronized.
Accept the Storybook coverage limitation: .storybook is outside allowed_paths, so the existing WebClientShell story is reused and storybook:build passes with the M5 workspace included.
Accept client session save/load as a client replay checkpoint DTO, not an authoritative save-format envelope. Authoritative M5 simulation/runtime save evidence remains in M5-SIM-PLAYABLE-LOOP-001.
Preserve M5 formal passage and manual node battle as Human Gates; this task does not implement manual battle or pass M5.
risks: P3: Storybook coverage is through the existing WebClientShell story rather than a dedicated M5 story file because .storybook is outside this task allowed_paths.
P3: Browser worker execution for every M5 command remains outside this client UI task; this task submits GameCommandV1 DTOs and displays protocol/read-model evidence.
P3: Web and Storybook builds continue to emit the pre-existing Vite large chunk warning.
requested_action: Commit lead acceptance, push branch, open PR, wait for CI, merge into main, then close M5-CLIENT-PLAYABLE-UI-001 and continue to the next dependency-ready M5 task.
